name: Daily CS Churn Report to Slack

parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT
  c.account_name,
  c.from_date                              AS churn_date,
  c.churn_reason_modified                  AS churn_reason,
  c.customer_churn_reason,
  c.churn_type,
  c.account_segmentation,
  c.geo_area,
  ROUND(c.avg_mrr, 2)                      AS avg_mrr,
  ROUND(c.churn_mrr_including_payments, 2) AS churn_mrr,
  c.csm,
  u.Name                                   AS account_owner,
  c.etf
FROM `guesty-data.csm.csm_churn_report` c
LEFT JOIN `guesty-data.salesforce.sf_account` sf
  ON c.account_id = sf.Guesty_Admin_ID__c
LEFT JOIN `guesty-data.salesforce.sf_users` u
  ON sf.OwnerId = u.Id
WHERE c.from_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
ORDER BY c.from_date DESC
LIMIT 50

googleApi.name: Google Service Account n8n-ai-cx-read - Cross Dept
